title: BlazeyDoubleJump
description: A simple double jump plugin for servers.
body:
# Features
- DoubleJump and InfiniteJump along with custom actions and cooldowns.
- [WorldGuard](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldguard) support to control region-based jump abilities
- [PlaceHolderAPI](https://modrinth.com/plugin/placeholderapi) support for [custom](https://wiki.placeholderapi.com/users/placeholder-list/) placeholders.
- Configuration (Optional)
# Commands
- /bdj help [command] - blazeydoublejump.command.help
- /bdj reload [config] - blazeydoublejump.command.reload
- /bdj settings <option> <value> - blazeydoublejump.command.settings
# Permissions
- blazeydoublejump.doublejump - Allows the player to use the DoubleJump ability (enabled by default).
- blazeydoublejump.infintejump - Allows the player to use the InfiniteJump ability.
# Support
Got questions or need support? Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/Kew8x2x2XH), we'll be happy to help you there!
